qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half begins.
Richie Laryea (Canada) wins a free kick on the left wing.
Foul by Luca Jaquez (Switzerland).
Luca Jaquez (Switzerland) wins a free kick on the right wing.
Corner, Switzerland. Conceded by Alistair Johnston.
Breel Embolo (Switzerland) wins a free kick in the attacking half.

events.description: 德里克·科尼利厄斯犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Johan Manzambi (Switzerland) wins a free kick on the left wing.

Attempt saved. Breel Embolo (Switzerland) right footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Maxime Crépeau (Canada). Assisted by Ricardo Rodríguez with a through ball.

events.description: 恩博洛射正。 里卡多·罗德里格斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Johan Manzambi (Switzerland) right footed shot from the centre of the box is blocked.
Foul by Luca Jaquez (Switzerland).
Offside, Canada. Cyle Larin is caught offside.
Offside, Canada. Cyle Larin is caught offside.
Foul by Ricardo Rodríguez (Switzerland).

events.description: 里卡多·罗德里格斯犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Luca Jaquez (Switzerland).

Attempt saved. Breel Embolo (Switzerland) left footed shot from the left side of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Maxime Crépeau (Canada). Assisted by Ricardo Rodríguez with a headed pass.

events.description: 恩博洛射正。 里卡多·罗德里格斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Rubén Vargas (Switzerland).
Foul by Ricardo Rodríguez (Switzerland).

events.description: 里卡多·罗德里格斯犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Luc De Fougerolles (Canada) right footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Gregor Kobel (Switzerland). Assisted by Mathieu Choinière with a cross.
qualifiers.espnShortText: Luc de Fougerolles Shot On Targe

events.description: 卢克·德富热罗勒射正。 马蒂厄·乔尼埃参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Richie Laryea (Canada) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Offside, Switzerland. Johan Manzambi is caught offside.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Granit Xhaka (Switzerland) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Attempt saved. Cyle Larin (Canada) right footed shot from the left side of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Gregor Kobel (Switzerland). Assisted by Jonathan David with a through ball.

events.description: 赛尔·拉林射正。 乔纳森·戴维参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, Canada. Cyle Larin is caught offside.
Breel Embolo (Switzerland) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Attempt missed. Granit Xhaka (Switzerland) left footed shot from outside the box is too high from a direct free kick.
Foul by Remo Freuler (Switzerland).
Attempt missed. Alistair Johnston (Canada) right footed shot from outside the box is too high following a set piece situation.

events.description: 阿利斯泰尔·约翰斯顿射门偏出。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Ali Ahmed (Canada) right footed shot from the left side of the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Gregor Kobel (Switzerland). Assisted by Jonathan David.

events.description: 阿里·艾哈迈德射正。 乔纳森·戴维参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Canada. Conceded by Gregor Kobel.
Foul by Rubén Vargas (Switzerland).
Attempt missed. Jonathan David (Canada) left footed shot from the left side of the box misses to the left. Assisted by Tajon Buchanan.

events.description: 乔纳森·戴维射门偏出。 塔琼·布坎南参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Switzerland. Conceded by Mathieu Choinière.
Fourth official has announced 4 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时4分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Breel Embolo (Switzerland).
First Half ends, Switzerland 0, Canada 0.
Second Half begins Switzerland 0, Canada 0.
